All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

R

refreshCell(int, int, Cell, GameView.CellState) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
Updates the visual state of a single cell.
Region - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.model
Represents a 2×3 region (block) in the Sudoku board.
Region(int) - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
Constructs a Region at the given index and initializes its 6 cells with their absolute grid coordinates.
REGION_COUNT - Static variable in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
 
renderBoard(Board) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
Renders all cells according to current board state (after board generation).
requestHint() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.BoardManager
Returns a random empty cell with its solution value for hint display.
reset() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Board
Resets all non-given cells, clearing player guesses and marked states.
resetBoard() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.BoardManager
Clears all player guesses without regenerating the board.
